title: ebnerella fasciculata
intro: Ebnerella fasciculata is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the shrubby false aster. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ebnerella fasciculata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce pain and swelling, and aid in the healing of wounds. Ebnerella fasciculata can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
